summary: Kang Hyunwoo, once the top-ranked player 'MeleeGod' in the MMORPG Arena, abruptly quit the game to focus on his real-world career and inherit his father's business. Two years later, his family's construction company faces bankruptcy due to a malicious betrayal orchestrated by his father's partner, leaving his father ill and Hyunwoo working a low-wage job. Fueled by a desire for revenge after a humiliating confrontation with the betrayer's arrogant son, Hyunwoo decides to return to Arena, seeing it as his only path to financial stability and power. He reaches out to his friend for help and, upon re-entering the game, immediately demonstrates his extraordinary talent by setting a new record in the tutorial's magic power test.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo, known as 'MeleeGod,' permanently resigns from the world-renowned MMORPG Arena despite being the top player, intending to focus on his real-world future.
Two years later, his family's construction company goes bankrupt due to a betrayal by his father's business partner, plunging them into immense debt and leaving his father bedridden.
Now working a convenience store job, Hyunwoo encounters Jung Hanbaek, who provocatively boasts about his father's role in the betrayal, igniting Hyunwoo's fierce desire for revenge.
Driven by financial desperation and the thirst for vengeance, Hyunwoo decides to re-enter Arena, contacting his friend Youngchan for assistance.
Hyunwoo creates a new character in Arena and immediately sets a new record in the tutorial's magic power application test, catching the attention of the game's management.
